heroHeadline: CJNG Crisis Day 55 — CDN Casino Network Sanctioned, Pemex Gulf Leak, World Cup 54 Days Out
heroSubtitle: US Treasury sanctions CDN casino stash houses in Nuevo Laredo and Tampico (Apr 14). El Mayo sentencing now May 18 (2nd postponement). CJNG succession stable under O3. Pemex pipeline leak prompts official firings (Apr 17). World Cup opens June 11 with 100,000 security personnel deployed. USMCA review July 1.
footerNote: Aggregated intelligence from all Mexico-based Watchboard trackers. Data sourced from SEDENA, SESNSP, InSight Crime, OHCHR, and major international outlets.
